name: Website Screenshot API
description: Capture high-quality, full-page or viewport screenshots of any public URL. Supports custom viewports, device emulation (mobile/desktop), and delayed rendering for SPAs.
shortDesc: Generate high-resolution screenshots of any URL

params.name: full_page
params.desc: Capture the entire scrolling page. Default: false

params.name: delay
params.desc: Time to wait before capturing (ms). Max: 10000

howItWorks: Send a target URL with your desired viewport settings
Our headless Chrome fleet navigates to the URL
The system waits for network idle and custom delays (for React/Vue apps to render)
A high-res screenshot is captured and uploaded to our CDN
You receive a secure URL to download or embed the image
